name: Incident Communication Plan
description: Orchestrates internal and external stakeholder communication during an active incident. Riggs AI generates an executive summary and recommends a communication tier based on severity. Critical incidents trigger a full communication cascade: internal leadership briefing via email, customer-facing status page update, PR/legal notification, and a dedicated Slack channel for coordinated updates. Non-critical incidents receive an internal SOC notification and status log update. All communications are tracked for compliance and audit purposes.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Create incident communication channels and distribute updates to stakeholders

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Track all incident communications for audit and compliance

config.description: Triggers when an incident requires coordinated communication to internal and external stakeholders

config.additional_instructions: Assess the incident severity and recommend a communication tier. Determine which stakeholders need to be notified: internal only, internal + customers, or full crisis communication including PR and legal.
config.description: AI-powered assessment to determine the appropriate communication tier and stakeholder notification scope
Route based on whether the incident requires full crisis communication or standard internal notification
Send leadership briefing email with incident executive summary and current status
Create a dedicated Slack channel for coordinated incident communications
Alert PR and Legal teams that a significant incident may require external communication
Create a Jira ticket to track all incident communications for audit and compliance purposes
Full crisis communication plan activated — leadership, PR, and legal notified, comms channel created
Post internal notification to the SOC Slack channel for standard-severity incidents

parameters.note: Incident communication plan executed — internal notification only. Severity did not warrant external communication. SOC team notified via Slack.

config.description: Log that only internal communication was required for this incident severity level
Internal communication complete — SOC team notified, no external communication required
